options.command: pnpm exec openapi-generator-cli generate -i http://localhost:18080/v3/api-docs -g typescript-angular -o libs/generated/spring-api-client/src/generated --skip-validate-spec --additional-properties=ngVersion=22.0.5,providedIn=root,serviceSuffix=ApiService,apiPackage=api,modelPackage=models,supportsES6=true,withSeparateModelsAndApi=true
